regime_24h.divergence_note: NLP says SIDEWAYS but newsletter context says BEARISH
regime_24h.context_key_risks:
- **April 6 Iran deadline** — Trump's primetime address Apr 1 provided zero new clarity; threatened to hit electrical/water plants if no deal. Iran fired more rockets, does not appear to want deal. Oil surged 13% on Apr 2.
  - **Long weekend gap risk**: Market closed Good Friday Apr 3; NFP releases
context_themes: **Trump Apr 1 primetime address = nothing new; April 6 deadline remains the binary**: Market initially deep red Apr 2, recovered to flat on Iran's Oman mediation signal. Oil popped 13% then partially reversed. No clarity on endgame — contradictory statements about Iran's capabilities vs. continued bombing.

**Quarterly bearish engulfing candle confirmed**: Q1 opened above Q4, closed below entire Q4 body. Last time (Q1 2025) led to major drawdown. SPY 618.81 (8-quarter MA) = critical line; no close below since 2022 recession.

**21 EMA is the recovery barometer**: No single close above 21 EMA since war began (same pattern as COVID crash Feb-Apr 2020 and Apr 2025 tariff crisis). Multiple consecutive closes above 21 EMA = genuine bottom signal. Do not call bottoms until then.

**Smashelito: Auction returned to prior balance area**: After last week's seller initiative failed to sustain, market returned to balance. 6635 = key HTF level; reclaim = bullish, rejection = bearish continuation.

**Fidenza bearish: Recession positioning via 20-delta puts**: Geo Chen expressing recessionary view via Sept puts on CVNA, MU, HOOD. Long CL (WTI front-month) for Hormuz closure optionality. Bearish equities.
**Memory sector whipsaw**: TurboQuant panic (Google compression algo) reversed violently Apr 1; WDC/MU/INTC all +8-10%. Thesis: cheaper memory per query = more total AI deployment.
**Private credit stress spreading**: Blue Owl 40.7% redemption requests in tech fund; sector-wide selling of BX/APO/KKR despite limited actual exposure. $11B pulled industry-wide in 2 quarters.
**SpaceX confidential IPO filing**: Targeting June 2026 at up to $1.75T valuation. Space/satellite infrastructure names surged (SBAC +19%, GSAT +13%).
context_sentiment_tones: Risk-off with tactical bounces; geopolitical uncertainty dominating
Mixed — ceasefire hope vs. binary event risk from Trump speech
Decisively bearish; positioning for recession + stagflation
